title: Mastering the PPDT (Picture Perception & Description Test) in SSB
author: Capt. R. K. Sharma (Retd.)
data: The Picture Perception and Description Test (PPDT) is a critical stage in the Day 1 Screening at SSB. Candidates are shown a hazy picture for 30 seconds, and given 4 minutes to write a story about it. In this guide, we discuss how to identify the characters, create a positive and action-oriented plot, write a structured story with a clear solution, deliver a confident 1-minute individual narration, and constructively participate in the group discussion to reach a consensus.
